name: fluid-thermal
description: Initialize pore pressure and temperature fields for hydro-mechanical and thermal analyses, directly on gridpoints or as a depth gradient.

methods.name: pore pressure
notes: Use 'gradient' for a hydrostatic profile; pair with the fluid/effective-stress workflow.

methods.name: temperature
notes: 'block insitu fluid-temperature' seats the fluid temperature for thermal-fluid coupling.

validation_checks: FISH: block.gridpoint.pp(gp) / block.gridpoint.temp(gp) confirm the initialized field
